g.text: SCP setup scripts and published files through bastion
2. The script creates the Azure resource group `CloudsoftJobRG`.
3. It deploys `main.bicep` with `main.bicepparam` to create the Azure infrastructure.
4. Azure creates the VNet, NSGs, Bastion VM, Proxy VM, App VM, Cosmos DB, and Blob Storage.
5. The script reads deployment outputs like VM IPs, Cosmos DB name, and Blob container URL.
6. It builds the MongoDB connection string from the Cosmos DB account key.
7. It uploads `hero.png` to the public Azure Blob `images` container.
8. It publishes `Cloudsoft.Web` into the local `publish` folder.
9. It connects to private VMs through the Bastion VM using SSH ProxyJump.
10. It configures the Proxy VM with Nginx to forward traffic to the App VM on port 8080.
11. It configures the App VM with .NET, environment variables, MongoDB, Blob URL, and systemd.
12. It copies the published files to `/opt/cloudsoft` and restarts `cloudsoft-web`.
13. A browser opens the Proxy VM public IP; Nginx forwards requests to Cloudsoft.Web.
